name: unifapi
description: Skills and OAuth MCP server for UnifAPI public-data workflows: social, search, scrape, news, and agent-ready analysis.

interface.longDescription: UnifAPI gives agents reusable skills and OAuth MCP access for public social, search, scrape, news, and creator analysis workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use UnifAPI to gather public evidence for this task.
Analyze these creators with live public social data.
Find the right UnifAPI operation and return a brief.
